mission: Build a practical kids activity site whose durable advantage is original, parent-useful, safely tested content.
release_policy: During the proving period, reviewed exact-path commits are allowed; push and deployment require user approval.

local_dependencies.name: semrush
local_dependencies.fallback: Continue without Semrush and label the evidence unavailable or stale.

local_dependencies.name: parent-test-evidence
local_dependencies.reason: Requires real observations supplied by the user
local_dependencies.fallback: Improve intake and tooling, but never invent test results.
